ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "idno" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual in years */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the individual in pounds */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the individual in inches */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individual */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the individual */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the individual was registered in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("idno")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_composition" (
  "idno" INTEGER /* Unique identifier referencing the individual (foreign key) */,
  "bodyfat" REAL /* Percentage of body fat */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the body in g/cm³ */,
  "adiposity" REAL /* Adiposity score indicating fat distribution */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the body composition was measured */,
  "muscle_mass" REAL /* Percentage of muscle mass */,
  "bone_density" REAL /* Bone density */,
  "visceral_fat" REAL /* Visceral fat level */,
  "water_percentage" REAL /* Body water percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("idno")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_measurements" (
  "idno" INTEGER /* Unique identifier referencing the individual (foreign key) */,
  "neck" REAL /* Circumference of the neck in cm */,
  "chest" REAL /* Circumference of the chest in cm */,
  "abdomen" REAL /* Circumference of the abdomen in cm */,
  "hip" REAL /* Circumference of the hip in cm */,
  "thigh" REAL /* Circumference of the thigh in cm */,
  "knee" REAL /* Circumference of the knee in cm */,
  "ankle" REAL /* Circumference of the ankle in cm */,
  "biceps" REAL /* Circumference of the biceps in cm */,
  "forearm" REAL /* Circumference of the forearm in cm */,
  "wrist" REAL /* Circumference of the wrist in cm */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurements were taken */,
  "waist" REAL /* Circumference of the waist in cm */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Circumference of the shoulder in cm */,
  "upper_arm" REAL /* Circumference of the upper arm in cm */,
  "lower_arm" REAL /* Circumference of the lower arm in cm */,
  "calf" REAL /* Circumference of the calf in cm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("idno")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "idno" INTEGER /* Unique identifier referencing the individual (foreign key) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "bodyfat" REAL /* Percentage of body fat recorded on that date */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the body recorded on that date in g/cm³ */,
  "adiposity" REAL /* Adiposity score recorded on that date */,
  "muscle_mass" REAL /* Percentage of muscle mass recorded on that date */,
  "bone_density" REAL /* Bone density recorded on that date */,
  "visceral_fat" REAL /* Visceral fat level recorded on that date */,
  "water_percentage" REAL /* Body water percentage recorded on that date */,
  "waist" REAL /* Circumference of the waist recorded on that date in cm */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Circumference of the shoulder recorded on that date in cm */,
  "upper_arm" REAL /* Circumference of the upper arm recorded on that date in cm */,
  "lower_arm" REAL /* Circumference of the lower arm recorded on that date in cm */,
  "calf" REAL /* Circumference of the calf recorded on that date in cm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_history_idno FOREIGN KEY ("idno") REFERENCES individuals ("idno")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health professional, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered in the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
